hooks.name: Run UAT after git push
hooks.description: Triggers the Ise UAT Playwright test runner after a git push is executed via bash. Runs tests, updates steering knowledge, and feeds results to Hermes.

action.command: cd /Users/garymcdaniel/kiro/ai-studio88 && python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=data.get('toolInput',{}).get('command',''); exit(0) if 'git push' in cmd else exit(1)" 2>/dev/null && cd frontend && npx playwright test --project=desktop --timeout=20000 --workers=1 --reporter=json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); suites=data.get('suites',[]); total=sum(len(sp.get('tests',[])) for s in suites for sp in s.get('specs',[])); passed=sum(1 for s in suites for sp in s.get('specs',[]) for t in sp.get('tests',[]) if t.get('status')=='expected'); failed=total-passed; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'summary':f'UAT: {passed}/{total} pass ({failed} fail)','passed':passed,'total':total,'failed':failed}}))" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"summary":"UAT hook: tests not available (frontend not running or playwright not installed)"}}'
